evals.name: clinical-review-mixed-audience
evals.prompt: 我下週有 lab meeting 要 present 這篇 paper，幫我做 slides

paper.pdf_filename: [held locally in _private/ for licensing reasons; the extraction and design lessons below are general and reproducible against any comparable review paper]
paper.note: Elsevier-family layout. Tests Tier-2 pdf-extraction path (get_images returns empty, must use caption-anchored page crop).

files_produced: pages/page-NN.png sidecars for every host page
deck.html (self-contained, uses Taipei Sans TC Beta with JhengHei fallback)
design_brief_invariants: Cover slide shows the paper title prominently — the user corrected an earlier attempt that demoted it; do not revert
All paper figures embedded on dedicated figure slides (per Q10=A)
Primary-emphasis block spans ~35% of deck (per Q4=A emphasis weighting)
Parallel subjects (e.g. three pathogens / three mechanisms) each get a dedicated slide
Slide titles on content slides are statements or questions, not topic labels
'Figure N' does NOT appear as title or eyebrow on content slides
Every content slide keeps body text under 40 words
Every slide has Chinese speaker notes (≥ 130 characters each)
All-caps labels have reasonable tracking — no exploded letter-spacing
verification_tier_A: OCR of each slide returns at least 80% of expected body text
Blown-tracking detector (space-ratio > 0.4) returns false for every slide
Figure slides have non-background pixel regions >= 400x300

known_limitations: Figure crops from pymupdf page-clip are 200 DPI — fine for on-screen projection, may soften in print
Taipei Sans TC Beta is loaded from jsdelivr CDN in HTML deck; PPTX has no font-embed so relies on viewer having the font installed (fallback: Microsoft JhengHei on Windows)
No LaTeX math in this paper, so equation-handling.md paths were not exercised

regression_signals.if_cover_title_becomes_a_statement_inste: Bug — user preference was explicit. See CHANGELOG v0.2.0 'Fixed' entry.
regression_signals.if_Figure_N_appears_as_eyebrow_or_title_: Bug — violates anti-slop #10. Eyebrow should be topic only; figure number in caption.
regression_signals.if_core_content_slides_have_paragraph_st: Regression — violates anti-slop #12 and pattern discipline. Should be row-list + 2 short bullets, ≤ 40 words.

evals.name: phase3-rct-mixed-audience
evals.prompt: start a paper · 混合含 trainees · 30-45 min · treatment-narrative 重點 · 英文 slide + 中文 notes

paper.type: phase-3 randomized controlled trial, positive primary
paper.venue_class: top-tier clinical journal (large spread, landscape tables)
paper.note: Exercised Tier 2b (facing-page figure) and Tier 2c (landscape table rotation) and Tier 0 (docling).

files_produced: figures/ with tight crops including one facing-page figure
pages/ sidecars for every host page
outline.md (25 slides after 3 table-overview slides inserted)
design_brief_invariants: Narrative arc: hook (slide 2) → setup (slide 4) → payoff (slide 18) → echo (slide 22) is intact
Facing-page figure extracted from the correct page (not the caption page)
Landscape tables render in readable orientation
All three paper tables reach the deck (one baseline + two landscape overviews)

regression_signals.if_docling_picks_up_small_page_chrome_ic: Junk filter regression — external-extractors.md §'What docling does poorly'

candidate_next_evals.name: arxiv-ml-primary-research
candidate_next_evals.why: Test Tier-1 pdf-extraction (embedded images) and the IMRAD P1-P8 pattern chain on a theory-heavy paper with equations
candidate_next_evals.suggested_paper_type: NeurIPS / ICML proceedings paper with 4+ figures and 3+ equations

candidate_next_evals.name: nature-short-letter
candidate_next_evals.why: Test the 5-minute lightning talk format (P1 -> P3 -> P5 -> P8) and a different publisher fingerprint
candidate_next_evals.suggested_paper_type: Nature Letters or Science Report, under 6 pages

candidate_next_evals.name: thematic-review-p9
candidate_next_evals.why: Test pattern P9 Thematic Review explicitly — a review paper where the 5-theme structure is natural and IMRAD forcing would fail
candidate_next_evals.suggested_paper_type: A 'five emerging technologies in X' style review

candidate_next_evals.name: bilingual-zh-en
candidate_next_evals.why: Test Q7=C (English titles + Chinese body) — the deck currently only exercises pure-English slides + Chinese notes
candidate_next_evals.suggested_paper_type: Any paper; exercises layout wrapping for mixed-script text

candidate_next_evals.name: equation-heavy-physics-or-ml-theory
candidate_next_evals.why: Exercise equation-handling.md paths (matplotlib retype vs LaTeX Beamer switch)
candidate_next_evals.suggested_paper_type: Theoretical physics / ML theory with 6+ inline equations
